# Generate random NPIs

Creates an integer vector of unvalidated NPIs.

## Usage

``` r
generate(x = 10L, prop = 0.1, syntactic = TRUE)
```

## Arguments

- x:

  integer, number of NPIs to generate

- prop:

  double; proportion of NAs to insert

- syntactic:

  boolean; technically valid NPIs

## Value

An integer vector of unvalidated NPIs

## Examples

``` r
generate(100, 0.2, FALSE)
#>   [1] 1645358447 1164415312 1856458594 1103750512 1081470292 1169253906
#>   [7] 1552817006         NA 1620405001 1460366717 1828584216 1331812209

#>  [31] 1831766965         NA 1966369189         NA 1812847503 1921699145
#>  [37]         NA         NA 1446674514         NA         NA 1807595724
#>  [43] 1859083550 1208091799 1038012107 1864169699         NA         NA
#>  [49] 1755866133 1683469141 1743230604 1596276100 1892937746 1018721342
#>  [55]  100283200         NA 1062666215 1036360598 1188002298 1472059817
```
